name: @vibe-engineer-starter/golden-contracts-fixture
description: I-16A golden-contracts fixture: the canonical `ts-rest` + named-Zod contract for a golden-records boundary (single source of truth) PLUS the generated/shared client derived ONLY from that contract (no hand-authored fetch DTOs) and a generation marker/provenance. Domain-neutral sample/demo/reference (DL-14 / DL-16 / DL-20A). Mirrors the proven I-11 reference-flow pattern.

vibeEngineer.boundaryRule: the canonical contract is the only place golden-record Zod schemas / DTO shapes are defined (DL-14 §5); the generated client and the golden-api consumer import contract-derived types/client only

//dependency-model: Graph-neutral: this fixture path is NOT a pnpm workspace member (pnpm-workspace.yaml = packages/*, packages/presets/*, packages/adapters/*, infra/pulumi), so the modeled runtime deps below add ZERO edges to the real harness workspace graph and require no lockfile reconciliation. The REAL resolve+runtime of @ts-rest/core + zod is exercised by the golden-api witness runner via an ESM resolve loader hook anchored at the harness packages/contracts context (the validated I-15B-3 in-context resolution precedent) — NO install, NO manifest/lockfile edit, NO mock.
